title: IDA struct creation — declaring procps_scan_t pid field
html:
Browser tab strip shows the same-day Brotein / GitHub / yahirgonzalez.me / D2L / Enterprise Defense 2 OSU Proxmox VM all open at once — and the foreground IDA window is mid-Create struct flow declaring the pid field of procps_scan_t. Visual proof of the multi-context day (capstone backend + reverse-engineering homework + personal site).

ida pro · busybox · brotein · osu · enterprise defense vm · reverse engineering
